text:
Created attachment 204181
shar for audio/libopenshot-audio

I'm sorry I repeat.
audio/alsa-plugins is added to RUN_DEPENDS to suppress "no channels" error and get audio output.
audio/alsa-lib must use audio/alsa-plugins together if sound input from or output to /dev/dsp (oss).
